formal tone with detailed explanations
use of 'i am' at the beginning of multiple samples

use of 'i am' or 'i am writing to' as openers

long, run-on sentences expressing frustration without clear punctuation

short, abrupt sentences that express frustration
use of direct complaints without elaboration
frequent use of rhetorical questions to emphasize dissatisfaction
polite requests and formal language
use of detailed explanations for issues
formal request structure with complete sentences
use of polite language and phrases like 'please assist me'
